case_title: TANEIKA JONES VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, TANEIKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY (SFHA) $800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF TANEIKA JONES AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE JASON CASTLEBERRY, RISK & SAFETY ADMINISTRATOR FOR THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY. ALSO PRESENT WAS JOYCELYN PEREZ, LEGAL ASSISTANT FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, WHICH IS NOT A NAMED DEFENDANT IN PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED CLAIM, BUT APPEARED AT TODAY'S HEARING DUE TO SOME CONFUSION IN HOW THE CAPTION OF THE CLAIM IS COUCHED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
